name: quilt
description: Self-contained school schedules: one .db file per schedule, validated by a rules engine, edited and rendered through MCP.
long_description: Quilt exposes every schedule operation as an MCP tool over a self-contained SQLite .db file. The server is self-documenting: it ships operating instructions, guide:// resources (the .db model, xlsx migration, the live-views cookbook), view:// HTML skeletons, and workflow prompts (live_view, migrate_xlsx, new_schedule). Build live master and per-class views that render the authoritative `board` payload.

tools.name: board
tools.description: Authoritative render payload: grid + violations + timeslot metadata.

tools.name: import
tools.description: Import an .xlsx workbook into a new .db schedule.

tools.name: assign
tools.description: Assign a cohort to a (class, timeslot) cell.

prompts.name: live_view
prompts.description: Build a self-refreshing live HTML view (master or per-class).

prompts.name: migrate_xlsx
prompts.description: Import a legacy Excel workbook into a new schedule.

prompts.name: new_schedule
prompts.description: Create and populate a fresh schedule from scratch.
